# The Living Indexes

> A hub for self-updating indexes of the AI-builder ecosystem. Each index is
> recomputed daily from live GitHub signals.

Updated: 2026-06-08T05:28:15.712935+00:00  ·  1304 entries across 6 indexes

- [The Skill Index](https://skill-index-three.vercel.app) — 274 entries — Claude Code & AI-agent skills — skills, subagents, slash-commands, hooks.
- [The Eval Index](https://eval-index.vercel.app) — 267 entries — LLM & agent evaluation, benchmark, observability and red-teaming tools.
- [The Local LLM Index](https://local-llm-index.vercel.app) — 243 entries — Run LLMs on your own hardware — inference engines, runners, quantization.
- [The Prompt Index](https://prompt-index-gamma.vercel.app) — 132 entries — Prompt-engineering resources — collections, system prompts, optimizers, guides.
- [The RAG Index](https://rag-index.vercel.app) — 214 entries — Retrieval-augmented-generation — RAG frameworks, vector DBs, embeddings, reranking.
- [The Fine-Tuning Index](https://finetune-index.vercel.app) — 174 entries — Make your own model — fine-tuning frameworks, PEFT/LoRA, RLHF/DPO, training data.
